vouchers.description: Universal Studios Japan Studio Pass Special Offer
vouchers.tc: This "3000JPY" discount coupon is valid only for Universal Studios Japan Studio Pass Value Combo - [2 adults] 1-day Studio Pass + 3000JPY meal & shopping voucher. The number of discount codes is limited. Discount codes will be applied based on the order of checkout. If a warning appears during checkout that the discount code is not applicable, it means the code has reached its usage limit. The final discount will be as shown on the final checkout page. Expiration date: 2 weeks after code is received.

This "50%" discount coupon is valid only for "Klook Pass Hiroshima". Max discount of 11 USD. Each user is allowed to use it only once. The number of discount codes is limited. Discount codes will be applied based on the order of checkout. If a warning appears during checkout that the discount code is not applicable, it means the code has reached its usage limit. The final discount will be as shown on the final checkout page. Expiration date: March 31st

"[Early bird ticket] Tembo Deck & Galleria" "[Early bird ticket] Tembo Deck" Each user is allowed to use it only once. The number of discount codes is limited. Discount codes will be applied based on the order of checkout. If a warning appears during checkout that the discount code is not applicable, it means the code has reached its usage limit. The final discount will be as shown on the final checkout page. Expiration date: March 31st

This coupon does not apply to Shinkansen; please refer to the tagging on the search result page for eligible products. The offer is limited in quantity and will end once it is fully redeemed.

Enjoy 100% off your ticket price when you check out with promo code. Discount will be applied to the total bill during checkout. Promo code applicable to Science Centre Dinosaurs Exhibition Tickets only. Code is valid from 1 to 22 March 2026.
